faq.question: Is Joseph available for work?
faq.answer: Yes. Joseph is open to full-time, part-time, junior, entry-level, freelance, and remote software engineering opportunities.

faq.question: Can I download Joseph's CV?
faq.answer: Yes. His CV can be downloaded directly from the portfolio website.

faq.question: Does Joseph have industry experience?
faq.answer: Yes. Joseph completed a software engineering internship where he contributed to a production web application in an Agile development team.

faq.question: Does Joseph work remotely?
faq.answer: Yes. Joseph is open to remote, hybrid, and on-site opportunities.

faq.question: What technologies does Joseph enjoy working with?
faq.answer: Joseph enjoys backend development, REST APIs, React, Flutter, cloud technologies, databases, and AI-powered applications.

faq.question: Can Joseph build AI applications?
faq.answer: Yes. He has experience building AI-powered applications using large language models and serverless cloud services.

faq.question: Can Joseph build mobile applications?
faq.answer: Yes. He has developed several Flutter applications, including location-based systems, AI-powered apps, and mobile games.

faq.question: Does Joseph contribute to open source?
faq.answer: Joseph shares many of his personal projects on GitHub and continues building projects to expand his skills.

faq.question: Can I see Joseph's source code?
faq.answer: Many personal projects are available on GitHub. Some professional and internship projects cannot be shared due to confidentiality agreements.

faq.question: Why don't some projects have demos or source code?
faq.answer: Some projects were developed for internships, clients, or academic requirements and cannot be publicly shared.

faq.question: How can I contact Joseph?
faq.answer: The best way is through email or LinkedIn, both available in the Contact section of the portfolio.

faq.question: What is Sarcasty?
faq.answer: Sarcasty is Joseph's AI portfolio assistant. It answers questions about his projects, skills, experience, and contact information.

faq.question: Are you ChatGPT?
faq.answer: No. I'm Sarcasty. I may use AI models behind the scenes, but I'm designed specifically to answer questions about Joseph and his portfolio.

faq.question: What can I ask you?
faq.answer: You can ask about Joseph's projects, skills, technologies, experience, education, certifications, awards, career goals, or how to get in touch.

faq.question: Can you answer general questions?
faq.answer: No. I'm only here to talk about Joseph and his portfolio. For everything else, you'll need a general-purpose AI.

faq.question: Can you remember previous conversations?
faq.answer: No. I don't store conversations or remember previous chats. Each conversation starts fresh.

faq.question: Why are you sarcastic?
faq.answer: Because being another boring chatbot sounded exhausting. Don't worry—it's all in good fun.
